name: Adil Hussain
profileSummary:
Khandkar Mohammad Adil Hussain pronounced [adil ɦusɛin] is an Indian actor who is known for his work in several Indian independent and mainstream film productions, as well as international cinema, in films such as The Reluctant Fundamentalist and Life of Pi .
He received National Film Awards at the 64th National Film Awards for Hotel Salvation and Maj Rati Keteki.
